      have h₁₀ : x + 1 / (2 * x) ≥ Real.sqrt 2 := by
        field_simp [h₂.ne', h₃.ne']
        rw [le_div_iff (by positivity)]
        nlinarith [Real.sq_sqrt (show 0 ≤ 2 by norm_num),
          sq_nonneg (x - Real.sqrt 2 / 2)]
      exact h₁₀
    exact h₅
  -- Now we can prove the original inequality
  have h₂ : 2 - Real.sqrt 2 ≥ 2 - x - 1 / (2 * x) := by
    have h₃ : x + 1 / (2 * x) ≥ Real.sqrt 2 := h₁
    have h₄ : 2 - Real.sqrt 2 ≥ 2 - x - 1 / (2 * x) := by
      linarith
    exact h₄
  exact h₂

sq_nonneg (x - 1 / (2 * x))]
      have h₅₅ : 2 * Real.sqrt (x * (1 / (2 * x))) = Real.sqrt 2 := by
        -- Simplify the expression under the square root
        have h₅₅₁ : Real.sqrt (x * (1 / (2 * x))) = Real.sqrt (1 / 2) := by
          have h₅₅₂ : x * (1 / (2 * x)) = 1 / 2 := by
            field_simp [h₁.ne']
            <;> ring
            <;> field_simp [h₁.ne']
            <;> linarith
          rw [h₅₅₂]
        rw [h₅₅₁]
        -- Simplify the square root of 1/2
        have h₅₅₃ : Real.sqrt (1 / 2) = Real.sqrt 2 / 2 := by
          have h₅₅₄ : Real.sqrt (1 / 2) = Real.sqrt 2 / 2 := by
            rw [Real.sqrt_eq_iff_sq_eq (by positivity) (by positivity)]
            ring_nf
            <;> norm_num
            <;> linarith [Real.sqrt_nonneg 2, Real.sq_sqrt (show 0 ≤ 2 by norm_num)]
          rw [h₅₅₄]
        rw [h₅₅₃]
        <;> ring_nf
        <;> field_simp [Real.sqrt_eq_iff_sq_eq]
        <;> ring_nf
        <;> norm_num
        <;> linarith [Real.sqrt_nonneg 2, Real.sq_sqrt (show 0 ≤ 2 by norm_num)]
      linarith
    -- Rearrange the inequality to get the desired result
    have h₆ : 2 - Real.sqrt 2 ≥ 2 - x - 1 / (2 * x) := by
      linarith
    exact h₆
  intro x hx
  exact h_main x hx

show that x + 1 / (2 * x) ≥ sqrt(2)
  have h₅ : x + 1 / (2 * x) ≥ Real.sqrt 2 := by
    -- Prove that (x - sqrt(2)/2)^2 ≥ 0 using the fact that squares are non-negative
    have h₅₁ : 0 ≤ (x - Real.sqrt 2 / 2) ^ 2 := sq_nonneg _
    -- Expand the square and simplify to show x + 1 / (2 * x) ≥ sqrt(2)
    have h₅₂ : (x - Real.sqrt 2 / 2) ^ 2 ≥ 0 := by linarith
    have h₅₃ : x + 1 / (2 * x) ≥ Real.sqrt 2 := by
      field_simp [h₁.ne', h₂.ne'] at h₅₂ ⊢
      rw [le_div_iff (by positivity)] at *
      ring_nf at h₅₂ ⊢
      nlinarith [Real.sq_sqrt (show 0 ≤ 2 by norm_num), sq_nonneg (x - Real.sqrt 2 / 2)]
    exact h₅₃
  -- Use the result to prove the original inequality
  have h₆ : 2 - Real.sqrt 2 ≥ 2 - x - 1 / (2 * x) := by
    have h₆₁ : x + 1 / (2 * x) ≥ Real.sqrt 2 := h₅
    have h₆₂ : 2 - Real.sqrt 2 ≥ 2 - (x + 1 / (2 * x)) := by linarith
    have h₆₃ : 2 - (x + 1 / (2 * x)) = 2 - x - 1 / (2 * x) := by
      ring
    rw [h₆₃] at h₆₂
    linarith
  exact h₆

sq_nonneg (x - Real.sqrt 2 / 2), Real.sqrt_nonneg 2]
    exact h₄₅
  -- Use the established inequality to prove the main result
  have h₅ : 2 - Real.sqrt 2 ≥ 2 - x - 1 / (2 * x) := by
    have h₅₁ : x + 1 / (2 * x) ≥ Real.sqrt 2 := h₄
    have h₅₂ : 2 - Real.sqrt 2 ≥ 2 - (x + 1 / (2 * x)) := by
      linarith
    have h₅₃ : 2 - (x + 1 / (2 * x)) = 2 - x - 1 / (2 * x) := by
      ring
    linarith
  exact h₅

sqrt(2)
      have h₇ : 0 < x := hx
      have h₈ : 0 < 2 * x := by positivity
      have h₉ : 0 < 1 / (2 * x) := by positivity
      -- Use the AM-GM inequality
      have h₁₀ : x + 1 / (2 * x) ≥ 2 * Real.sqrt (x * (1 / (2 * x))) := by
        -- Apply AM-GM inequality
        have h₁₁ : 0 ≤ x := by linarith
        have h₁₂ : 0 ≤ 1 / (2 * x) := by positivity
        have h₁₃ : 0 ≤ x * (1 / (2 * x)) := by positivity
        -- Use the AM-GM inequality for two non-negative numbers
        nlinarith [sq_nonneg (x - 1 / (2 * x)), Real.sq_sqrt (by positivity : (0 : ℝ) ≤ x * (1 / (2 * x))),
          Real.sqrt_nonneg (x * (1 / (2 * x)))]
      -- Simplify the right-hand side of the inequality
      have h₁₁ : 2 * Real.sqrt (x * (1 / (2 * x))) = Real.sqrt 2 := by
        have h₁₂ : x * (1 / (2 * x)) = 1 / 2 := by
          field_simp
          <;> ring_nf
          <;> field_simp [h₇.ne']
          <;> ring_nf
        rw [h₁₂]
        have h₁₃ : Real.sqrt (1 / 2) = Real.sqrt 2 / 2 := by
          rw [Real.sqrt_eq_iff_sq_eq (by positivity) (by positivity)]
          ring_nf
          <;> field_simp <;> ring_nf <;> norm_num
        rw [h₁₃]
        <;> ring_nf <;> field_simp <;> ring_nf <;> norm_num
        <;>
        linarith [Real.sqrt_nonneg 2, Real.sq_sqrt (show 0 ≤ 2 by norm_num)]
      -- Combine the inequalities
      linarith
    -- Use the result from h₆ to prove the desired inequality
    have h₁₂ : 2 - Real.sqrt 2 ≥ 2 - x - 1 / (2 * x) := by
      have h₁₃ : x + 1 / (2 * x) ≥ Real.sqrt 2 := h₆
      have h₁₄ : -(x + 1 / (2 * x)) ≤ -Real.sqrt 2 := by linarith
      linarith
    exact h₁₂
  exact h₁

show that x + 1 / (2x) ≥ sqrt(2)
    have h₄ : (x + 1 / (2 * x)) ≥ Real.sqrt 2 := by
      -- Square both sides to eliminate the square root
      have h₅ : 0 ≤ x := by linarith
      have h₆ : 0 ≤ 1 / (2 * x) := by positivity
      have h₇ : 0 ≤ x + 1 / (2 * x) := by positivity
      have h₈ : (x + 1 / (2 * x)) ^ 2 ≥ 2 := by
        -- Expand the square and simplify
        field_simp [h₂.ne']
        rw [le_div_iff (by positivity)]
        -- Use nlinarith to verify the inequality
        nlinarith [sq_nonneg (x - 1 / Real.sqrt 2), Real.sq_sqrt (show 0 ≤ 2 by norm_num),
          Real.sqrt_nonneg 2, sq_nonneg (x * Real.sqrt 2 - 1)]
      -- Use the fact that the square of (x + 1 / (2x)) is at least 2 to conclude
      have h₉ : Real.sqrt 2 ≥ 0 := Real.sqrt_nonneg 2
      nlinarith [Real.sq_sqrt (show 0 ≤ 2 by norm_num), sq_nonneg (x + 1 / (2 * x) - Real.sqrt 2)]
    exact h₄
  
  have h₂ : 2 - Real.sqrt 2 ≥ 2 - x - 1 / (2 * x) := by
    have h₃ : x + 1 / (2 * x) ≥ Real.sqrt 2 := h_main
    have h₄ : 2 - (x + 1 / (2 * x)) ≤ 2 - Real.sqrt 2 := by
      linarith
    have h₅ : 2 - (x + 1 / (2 * x)) = 2 - x - 1 / (2 * x) := by
      ring
    linarith
  
  exact h₂
